sn48.14:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these five faculties. What five? The faculty of faith … the faculty of wisdom. These are the five faculties.
sn48.14:1.2: "One who has completed and fulfilled these five faculties is an arahant. If they are weaker than that, one is … a faith-follower.
sn48.14:1.3: "Thus, bhikkhus, one who activates them fully succeeds fully; one who activates them partly succeeds partly. The five faculties, bhikkhus, are not barren, so I say."
